# Resolution overrides for iac.txt (uv pip compile --overrides).
# Same idea as the npm `overrides` in package.json: force a transitive
# dependency past a consumer's stale upper bound to pick up security fixes.
#
# aiohttp: checkov (<= 3.3.6) pins aiohttp<3.14.0, but every aiohttp release
# below 3.14.1 carries open advisories (GHSA-jg22-mg44-37j8, GHSA-xcgm-r5h9-7989,
# and nine more — Dependabot alerts #14-#24). checkov only uses aiohttp as an
# HTTP client for platform API calls, which our CI invocation (local template
# scan) never exercises; the CI checkov gate passes unchanged on 3.14.1.
# Because this override violates checkov's declared metadata, the install in
# security.yml uses --no-deps (the lockfile is a complete, hash-verified
# closure, so dependency resolution at install time is redundant).
# Drop this override once checkov allows aiohttp>=3.14.1.
aiohttp==3.14.1
